---
title: "Lady Helena Trench"
---

## Lady Helena Trench

**Dates:** (1790/1-17 March 1881)

**Maiden name:** (Perceval)

### Description

mother of Maria (Trench) Wilson

### Biography

She was a sister of the 6th Earl of Egmont and of Sir William Heathcote's first wife; she married (9 Jan 1816) the Rev. Frederick Stuart Trench (19 March 1787-23 Nov 1860).  She lived with her daughter Mrs Wilson at Rownhams by 1867.  She was aunt by marriage to Frances Dorothy (Grimston) Moor;  another of her daughters Helena Trench (1820-1908) married the Very Rev. Jeffrey Lefroy, Dean of Dromore,  and was the mother of George Alfred Lefroy,  Bishop of Calcutta (1854–1919) [PB 1914 Ashtown;  PO Hants 1867;  <i>Erminois</i>; ODNB]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
